0x082e843a431aef031264dc232693dd710aedca88,Unknown HYPE Whale,low,high,manual_attribution_required,"Establish entity identity for Unknown HYPE Whale (0x082e843a431aef031264dc232693dd710aedca88). column24: Vague 'Whale Said to Be X' Style Notes,"Any label whose ONLY evidence comes from rejected_source categories must be immediately blocked with REJECTED_EVIDENCE_ONLY block reason.

column1: Rejected source types to avoid:
- Unsourced Social Post: No verifiable source
column2: social posts alone cannot establish address identity.

column1: - Single Anonymous Claim: Anonymous single-source claim without corroboration is insufficient.
- AI-Generated Attribution Without Source: AI-generated labels hallucinate
- Screenshot Without Verifiable URL or Note: Screenshots without reproducible evidence are not verifiable.
- Stale Label Without Update Date: Stale labels without timestamps may be outdated or incorrect.
- Label Copied from TG/Chat Without Evidence: Chat-based labels without evidence are hearsay.
- Vague 'Whale Said to Be X' Style Notes: Vague claims without specific evidence do not meet any evidence standard.",trusted_source_label_value
